Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 1"

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Video.title: Wildbound - "New Zealand"

Video.summary: The boys are at the dirty bird in Oklahoma kicking off the second day of bow season. Randy is already tagged out on a dandy of an 8 point we showed you last season in the “Camp Buck episode”. Joe Umphries from Big Tine is in camp and he is trying to close the deal on a buck he had a close call with last season at the Dirty Bird.
Video.title: "Bow Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: On this weeks episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade and his daughter Asa take on the turkey woods together for the first time. As this is Asa's first time turkey hunting some quick pre hunt preparations are in order. Slade also was able to sit down with a good friend and registered forester to talk fire and the benefits of fire in land management. The next day, Asa and Slade were able to connect with a thundering tom as Asa punched her first ever turkey tag!
Video.title: "Asa's First Turkey!"

Video.summary: The Amateur Division reaches its climax at the Super Retriever Series Crown Championship. Top teams battle through the final rounds of Retriever Trials, where every point matters. In the end, one standout handler and dog team rises above the rest to be crowned Amateur SRS Crown Champions. At the same time, the excitement continues on the dock as fun-loving canine athletes compete for their own Crown victories in SRS Super Dock.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 2"

Video.summary: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship brings together the nation’s top canine athletes and handlers in Shreveport-Bossier City, Louisiana. In Part 1 of the Amateur Division, teams face off in challenging Retriever Trials alongside high-energy SRS Super Dock competition. Precision, power, and teamwork are put to the test as the road to the Crown begins.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 1"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.
Video.title: "Turkey Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Randy is at the Raven in Missouri trying to take advantage of some dry weather and get some Big Tine borderline planted and check off a long list of other summer time prep work as opening day of deer season will be here before we know it.
Video.title: "Summer Time Work On The Raven"

Video.summary: Josh Dahlke makes the long-awaited journey to Hawaii as a critical piece to the Super Slam puzzle. Hawaii offers a turkey hunting adventure like none other, and there’s nobody resident companion than Jon Sabati – a Hawaii turkey hunting legend.
Video.title: "Volcano Gobbler"

Video.summary: Season 4 of Hunting Land Man is starting off with a bang. In this episode, it’s opening week of turkey season in Mississippi, and these birds are doing it right. Cool mornings, gobbles breaking daylight, and longbeards fired up and on the move. We are fired up for the 2026 turkey season.
Video.title: "Turkey Tombstone"

Video.summary: Despite adverse conditions, Capt. Jonathan Moss and long time friend, Capt. Adam Whitson, are heading out on the water in search of the Crystal River Inshore Slam.
Video.title: "Weather or Not"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Texas hits differently — especially when it’s your first time behind the gun. In this week’s HuntStand TURKEY POSSE episode, Will Cooper introduces longtime best friends Aubry Gold and Chance Eckert to the world of spring turkey hunting in the Lone Star State. What starts as a casual hunt quickly turns into full-blown addiction as Rio Grande gobblers fire up, decoys get worked, and the Texas cedars come alive.
Video.title: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Image.alt: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Video.summary: Slade and the old Trained Assassins crew are headed back to Montrose in pursuit of a big elk. The conditions are not favorable but the crew is sticking it out!
Video.title: "Montrose Elk Pt. 1"

Video.summary: Meet Captain Lionel James — a respected Destin, Florida guide known for his upbeat personality, strong community ties, and love for fitness when he’s not on the water.
Video.title: "Lionel James"

Video.summary: This week we join professional angler, Andrew Nordbye, for a cold day on Guntersville to catch some giant crappie; traveling through a major winter storm and arriving at an abandoned lake was the not-surprising scene for the day. Andrew's priorities are in order when it comes to his marriage, his faith, and his family, including just-arrived new babies...but he sill made time to squeeze in this day on water with us!
Video.title: "Alabama Artic Crappies"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor utilize the Yellowfin Hybrid 26’ to bring the Live Paddle Boards out to an Islamorada flat for a fun day of fishing for bonefish and some toothy critters.
Video.title: "Islamorada Paddleboard Fishing"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run west from Hawks Cay to fish the spring tarpon migration at the legendary Bahia Honda bridge.
Video.title: "Bahia Honda Tarpon"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head down to Key West to join Captain Brandon Cyr for some skinny water bonefishing.
Video.title: "Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"

Image.alt: "Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"
"Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"
"Bonefishing Key West with Captain Brandon Cyr"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve start the season with Capt. Scott Stoky chasing Islamorada Tunas and Mahis offshore out of Plantation Boat Mart.
Video.title: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Image.alt: "Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"
"Islamorada Blackfins And Mahis With Capt Scott Stoky"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve catch a mixed bag bottom fishing off of Islamorada with Captain Scott Stoky.
Video.title: "Islamorada Mixed Bag"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve go yellow tailing out of Hawks Cay for a limit of tasty yellowtail snapper and Steve picks a battle with a big lemon shark.
Video.title: "Yellowtails And Lemons At Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve bounce around the reefs out of Hawks Cay catching a wide variety of reef dwellers.
Video.title: "Reef Fishing Out Of Hawks Cay"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve take their brand new Invincible 36’ out of Plantation Boat Mart to fly the kites for some early season sailfishing.
Video.title: "Sailfish Season"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve make a big run from Plantation Boat Mart in the Invincible 36’ into the green Gulf waters to fill the Yeti cooler and battle with some seas monsters.
Video.title: "Into The Green"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared and Father-Son duo Captain’s Hunter & Chris Barron have Sailfish in their sights.
Video.title: "Like Father Like Son"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel to Parker, South Dakota for a European pheasant hunt at Wings of Valor Lodge! The South Dakota DAV chapter is onsite for a great day of hunting and fellowship. We also honor Missoula Scheels Hometown Hero, Anton Johnson!
Video.title: "Wings of Valor"

Video.summary: In this special 20th-anniversary episode, "Deer & Deer Hunting TV" takes a nostalgic journey through two decades of hunting television. Hosts Dan Schmidt and Brad Rucks lead viewers through memorable moments.
Video.title: "Twenty Years"

Video.summary: Dan Schmidt and Mark Kayser demonstrate the strategic use of terrain and natural cover to outsmart big whitetails. Then Mark heads to fill his tag in the rugged landscapes of South Dakota.
Video.title: "Advanced Techniques for Hunting Bog Whitetails"

Video.summary: Heroes are honored and embark on the hunt of a lifetime at the Bucks for the Brave event hosted by Record Rack and Trinity Oaks Non-Profit.
Video.title: "Bucks for the Brave"

Video.summary: We explore the sophisticated world of the whitetail deer's senses, exploring how these remarkable creatures have evolved to pattern hunters through their keen sense of smell and heightened sensory awareness.
Video.title: "Patterning Hunters"

Video.summary: Low country BBQ and Redfish? What more do you want?
Video.title: "Palm Beach BBQ"

Video.summary: CA heads to the scenic Low country of South Carolina for part one of an epic two-part redfish adventure.
Video.title: "Low Country Beat Down Pt 1"

Video.summary: In this episode the DCD crew heads to the lesser-known but highly productive Red River in Western Louisiana. Despite a slow start to the season, the Red River provides some of the best hunting yet. With mixed bags of woodies, greenheads, and teal. Not to mention a handful of bonus squirrels and wild mushrooms. Shoot straight and come hungry.
Video.title: "The Red River Provides"

Video.summary: Duck hunting in Louisiana is as much about its history as it is about its future. In the season's final days, Jean-Paul learns about Louisiana’s rich waterfowling history, dives into conservation projects throughout the state, and returns to Bayou Black for one last ride. Shoot straight and come hungry because it's the last hunt of the season.
Video.title: "Gravies, Gogs & Pirogues"

Video.summary: It’s still opening week of bow season in Oklahoma and the crew has three tags left to fill.
Video.title: "Tagged Out At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Trenton meets up with Tom Brewbaker as they fly down to Venice Louisiana to fish with Mike Frenette. Mike runs the Redfish Lodge of Louisiana and has over forty years of angling experience. Mike teaches the guys about the local waters including pogey boats and most importantly, world class red fish.
Video.title: "Crimson Waters"

Video.summary: Trenton goes down North Carolina to learn the family secrets of the Forehand family. Ben Forehand is a guitarist for Christian Contemporary artist Pat Barret. When Ben isn’t playing guitar, he runs Wild and Free Outfitters getting people into the outdoors hunting and fishing, getting their minds off of the everyday grind. . Even though fishing is tough the guys build strong friendships and lasting memories.
Video.title: "Wild and Free"

Video.summary: Trenton stays close to home and heads to the Lake of The Ozarks joining Austin Culbertson for a frigid couple days of fishing. The cold weather doesn’t hold back the fish, though, as they target brush piles with jerk baits and umbrella rigs.
Video.title: “Ozark Winter”

Video.summary: Trenton and Trevor pack up and drive down to Arkansas for their first experience on the White River. The brothers spend a day in the boat with Bryant Stark of Rising Rivers, fishing the White and the Norfork. Though the White is much larger waters than back home, Trevor utilizes his experience to catch them even while wading.
Video.title: "Brothers on the Fly”

Video.summary: The National Wild Turkey Federation stands for much more than the wild turkey – it’s also about forging lifelong relationships and enjoying the kind of fellowship you can only find in turkey camp. Josh Dahlke joins NWTF Regional Director Kevin Hurst and friends to celebrate Spring in pursuit of Missouri longbeards.
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Camp with NWTF"

Video.summary: After an epic hunt with POSSE ring leader Josh Dahlke in Minnesota, where Will Cooper bagged his first Eastern gobbler and turkey outside of Texas, he heads to Pennsylvania for round two! With HuntStand in hand and the crew from Bearded Buck, they head out on morning one to find gobbles thundering off in all directions.
Video.title: "Bearded Thunder Gobbler"

Video.summary: Josh Dahlke scouts a block of mature hardwoods to get the bead on a resident flock of turkeys. Fresh off an out-of-state turkey hunt, his brother, Jake, hops in the saddle for a memorable (and chaotic) morning in the spring turkey woods.
Video.title: "Chaos Gobbler"

Video.summary: Josh Dahlke and Pete Osterman travel to Washington state from Minnesota for a run-and-gun turkey camp. They get in the game and turn up plenty of turkeys, but hunting pressure – from humans and coyotes – has the gobblers on edge.
Video.title: "Evergreen State Gobblers"

Video.summary: Opening day in Mississippi has arrived and Slade is taking full advantage of it! With the weather not cooperating Slade and Zeb stumble into a turkey hunt they won't soon forget. Two days later, the hot streak continues with Slade connecting on another turkey on an 83 acre property he has for sale! Also, Slade gives some tips and his ideas on small acreage hunting, and how it can be just as lucrative as big tracks of land!
Video.title: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"

Image.alt: "Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
"Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"
"Opening Week in Mississippi started off with a BANG!!"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor trailer the new Cayo Skiff from Hawks Cay to Big Pine Key, FL to fish for big winter Barracudas.
Video.title: "Big Pine, Big Cudas"

Video.summary: In this episode of Turkey POSSE, Will Cooper follows Hudson Lochte through the Texas Hill Country as the young gun chases hard gobbling longbeards and knocks down multiple birds during an action-packed Spring turkey hunt. If you love turkey hunting, youth hunters, and classic Texas Hill Country action, this one delivers.
Video.title: "Obsessed with Gobbles | Texas Turkey Hunting"

Video.summary: Randy is getting the last food plot of the season in down at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma. Then opening day of the 2025 bow season starts off in an unusual way for the crew. Randy smokes a Hog and Nate Has a really close call with one of the target bucks.
Video.title: "Bow Camp 2025 at The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Bow season is finally here and the boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma. Randy is chasing a buck he named "The Camp Buck" because of how close the buck is to camp. If Randy can get it done this will be his biggest buck to date in Oklahoma.
Video.title: "The Camp Buck"

Video.summary: The boys are still at the Dirty bird in Oklahoma, trying to get a few more tasks done before heading back to the Raven in Missouri. They also manage to get out and do a little velvet scouting with the Hawk spotting scope.
Video.title: "Hanging Tree Stands And Velvet Scouting"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma trying to run some trot lines on the North Canadian river but the water is just a little lower than they expected.
Video.title: "Pirates Of The Canadian"
